diagrams.title: Pascal's Triangle Structure
diagrams.description: Triangular array showing binomial coefficients for n=0 to 5
elements: Each entry equals sum of two entries above it
diagrams.purpose: Visualize binomial coefficients and their relationships

diagrams.title: Binomial Expansion Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows the expansion pattern of (a+b)^n with coefficients and powers
elements: Powers of a decrease while b increases
diagrams.purpose: Understand the pattern in binomial expansion coefficients and terms
